chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1317 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For directions For non-prosecution of CMA No.7718/2023 (C/A) 10.01.2024 Mr. Niaz Hussain Maitlo, Advocate for respondents No.1 to 5. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel for respondents No.1 to 5 has filed through his statement an original cheque No.00010835 dated 09.01.2024 amounting to Rs.9,91,457/- and submits that this is a last and final payment of the petitioner in terms of order dated 13.09.2023. No one is present on behalf of the petitioner. Let this cheque be deposited with the Accountant of this Court, who shall handover the same to the petitioner on his due verification and identification. The listed application, having served its purpose, is according disposed of. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
